verses.2: Let Israel rejoice in him who made them.
verses.3: Let them praise his name in the dance!
verses.4: For the LORD takes pleasure in his people.
verses.5: Let the saints rejoice in honor.
verses.6: May the high praises of God be in their mouths,
verses.7: to execute vengeance on the nations,
verses.8: to bind their kings with chains,
verses.9: to execute on them the written judgment.
